hero.eyebrow: Web developer and maker in Norway
hero.tagline: Websites, web applications, PC, electronics and 3D printing. Working with clients across Norway.

services.label: What I can help with
services.title: What I work with
services.subtitle: From websites to circuit boards. I take on varied work and usually find a good solution.
services.web_desc: Straightforward websites and landing pages. They work, look good and are easy to maintain.
services.software_desc: Something that automates a task, keeps track of data or connects things together. I can sort that.
services.saas_desc: Apps with login, payments and user management. Done it a couple of times and know how it works.
services.pwa_desc: Web apps that work like a real app on the phone, without an app store and without installation.
services.fullstack_desc: I take responsibility for the whole solution, from database and API to what the user sees. One contact for everything.
services.consulting_desc: Need help thinking through something technical, or someone to bounce ideas with? Happy to help.
services.iot_desc: Smart solutions that connect physical things to the internet. Home automation, sensors and custom setups using e.g. Home Assistant.
services.print_desc: I have a 3D printer and can print simple things. Works well for practical use cases and prototypes.
services.pcb_desc: Microcontrollers, custom firmware and simple PCBs. I can design and order boards for small projects.
services.pc_desc: Repair, troubleshooting and reinstallation of PC and Mac. Help with hardware, upgrades and anything that stops working.

projects.label: Own projects
projects.title: Things I have built
projects.subtitle: A selection of projects I have built and launched.
projects.losttags_desc: A platform for QR labels you attach to things you do not want to lose. If someone finds the item and scans the code, the owner is automatically notified by email.
projects.losttags_f1: Custom QR labels with optional design
projects.inventoriz_desc: A simple inventory system for small teams. Keep track of what you have and where it is, scan QR codes in the browser and use it as an app on the phone.

blog.title: Blog
blog.subtitle: Things I have made, learned or thought up.

about.label: About me
about.title: TJLabs
about.body1: I am a web developer and maker. I like building things, whether that is websites, small tools, something to be printed out, or a simple electronics project.
about.body2: I have built and launched my own products, and take on freelance work on the side. I do not promise the impossible, but I give it a proper go.
about.val1_title: Honest about what I can do
about.val1_desc: I do not take on things I cannot handle. If something is beyond what I can manage, I will say so.
about.val2_desc: Not everything is familiar territory, but I like a challenge and take the time it needs.
about.val3_desc: I do not over-engineer things. A solution that works and is easy to use beats one that only looks good on paper.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Get in touch
contact.subtitle: Have something you need help with? Send me a message and we will figure it out together.
contact.name: Name
contact.subject: Subject
contact.message_placeholder: Tell me what you need help with.
contact.sent_sub: I will get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
contact.cta_sub: Tell me what it is about, what you need, and a bit about yourself.

faq.label: Questions and answers
faq.title: Common questions
faq.subtitle: What most people want to know.
faq.q1: How much does a website cost?
faq.a1: It depends on what you need. A simple landing page can cost a few thousand kroner, while a full business website with custom design typically starts at 10,000 to 30,000 kroner. I always provide a no-obligation estimate after a short conversation.
faq.q2: Do you work with clients across Norway?
faq.a2: Yes. I work with clients across the country. Get in touch by email and we will sort out the details.
faq.q3: What is the difference between a website and a web application?
faq.a3: A website is for information and presentation, for example a company page or portfolio. A web application is interactive and stores data, for example a booking system or a portal with login.
faq.q4: Can you build a website for my business?
faq.a4: Yes, that is exactly what I do. Get in touch and describe what you need, and we will figure it out.
faq.q5: Can you build a website with WordPress?
faq.a5: Yes, I can help with WordPress sites. I adapt to what you need.
faq.q6: Do you help with PCB and electronics?
faq.a6: Yes. I can design simple circuit boards, write firmware for microcontrollers and set up IoT solutions for smart homes and similar.
faq.q7: What should I do to get found on Google?
faq.a7: Start with a well-built website and use relevant keywords in your content. The websites I build are optimized for search engines from the start.
